topStories.headline: Trump Says Iran Deal To Be Signed June 14 Despite Doubts Cast By Tehran
topStories.summary: Trump announced a formal US-Iran ceasefire deal on June 14, including reopening the Strait of Hormuz and a 60-day MOU framework, sending futures higher on renewed risk appetite.
topStories.marketImpact: Broad equity indices ↑; crude oil ↓ ~2% to ~$85/bbl as Hormuz reopening eases supply fears; defense names ↓

topStories.headline: SpaceX IPO takeaways: SPCX closes at $161, jumping 19% after record debut
topStories.summary: SpaceX raised $75B at $135/share in the largest IPO in history; shares closed at $161 on day one and climbed to ~$167 in extended trading on Friday June 13, valuing the company at ~$2.2 trillion.
topStories.marketImpact: SPCX ↑ 19% day-one; space/satellite supply chain names ↑; broader Nasdaq lifted by sentiment

topStories.headline: Roku Inc. Surges 20% Amid Acquisition Talks
topStories.summary: Bloomberg reported Roku is in preliminary sale discussions with at least one major US media company, sending shares to a four-year high on Friday June 13.
topStories.marketImpact: ROKU ↑ ~20%; streaming/media M&A names ↑ on consolidation hopes

topStories.headline: Alphabet plans to raise $80 billion from stock sales to fund AI build-out
topStories.summary: Alphabet priced an $84.75B equity raise — the largest ever — including a $10B Berkshire Hathaway block, to fund massive AI compute infrastructure; GOOGL fell ~4% on dilution fears.
topStories.marketImpact: GOOGL ↓ on dilution; AI infrastructure names ↑ on capex signal; BRK.B sentiment ↑

topStories.headline: Huawei unveils new scaling law and tech that narrows gap with TSMC, Samsung
topStories.summary: Huawei introduced its Tau Scaling Law and LogicFolding 3D chip architecture, claiming a path to 1.4nm-equivalent chips by 2031 — analysts call it a potential 'DeepSeek moment' for China's chip sector.
topStories.marketImpact: China EDA/chip design names ↑; ASML sentiment mixed as Huawei aims to bypass EUV lithography

topStories.headline: Goldman Sachs Sees NVIDIA at $285: Firing on All Cylinders
topStories.summary: Goldman Sachs reiterated Buy with a $285 price target on Nvidia, citing datacenter dominance, AI PC ambitions, and growing agentic-AI adoption as catalysts.

companiesToWatch.name: Jabil Inc.
companiesToWatch.reason: Serenity's latest call — argues market underprices Jabil's 1.6T transceiver business; floats ~40% rerating potential

latestPicks.thesis: Markets haven't priced Jabil's 1.6T LRO pluggable-transceiver business which took over Intel's pluggable lines; ~40% rerating plausible by H1 2027
Photonics + power semis play at $1.28B MC; EU CHIPS Act 2 catalyst; 800 VDC power semi exposure to NVDA push
CW laser supplier for Jabil, Ayar, POET, Marvell — the chokepoint light source for CPO/Silicon Photonics. Called it 'the next $LITE'

priorPickMoves.move: Up 165% in one week following Jabil partnership thesis validation

serenity.sentiment: Aggressively bullish on AI/semi supply-chain chokepoints, especially photonics and CPO. 2026 YTD return claimed at +4,502%. 25 publicly shared picks have gained 100-1,000%.

quickHits: Crude oil fell ~2% to near $85/bbl on US-Iran deal hopes reopening the Strait of Hormuz — biggest weekly drop in months
Taylor Morrison Home (TMHC) popped 22% after Berkshire Hathaway agreed to acquire the homebuilder for $6.8B in cash
Peking University unveiled a 3D chip design EDA tool to power Huawei's LogicFolding architecture, boosting Chinese domestic EDA stocks
US equity markets posted a positive week: Dow closed ~51,200 on Friday; S&P 500 near record highs on SpaceX euphoria and Iran peace hopes
